offers.title: Lead Data Scientist
offers.description: Lead Data Scientist at Brigit, a fintech company focused on financial health for Americans. Building ML models for credit risk, fraud detection, and payment optimization. Stack: Python, SQL, sklearn, ML modeling, A/B testing, production deployment.

requirements.english: Advanced - Strong written and verbal communication

offers.match_reason: Excelente salario ($15k+/mes), Python+SQL, ML modeling puro. El requirement de 6+ años es el mayor filtro. Inglés avanzado requerido.
